Name: Occupational Therapy Retainer - Monthly
Description: Monthly peer consultation retainer fee. Includes protocol review, product feedback sessions, and up to 4 advisory calls per month.

Name: Professional Protocol Review - Per Session
Description: One-time professional protocol or content review. Includes written feedback document.

Name: Occupational Therapy Expert Consultation
Description: Hourly Occupational Therapy professional consultation on specific professional questions, feature validation, or research protocol design.

Name: CEU Workshop Facilitation
Description: Facilitation of continuing education workshop for Occupational Therapy professionals. Includes materials preparation.

Name: Pain Science Education Content Development
Description: Reader or coach education content creation. Per module deliverable.

Name: Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group Coordination - Half Day
Description: On-site pilot coordination support at Bitterroot Rehabilitation Center. Half-day rate.

Name: Research Advisory Session
Description: Advisory session for professional research design, IRB review support, or outcome measure selection.

Name: Product UX Professional Review
Description: Structured professional review of app UX/UI for accessibility and evidence-based professional workflow alignment.

Name: Hand Therapy Project Review - Per Project
Description: Detailed review of a complex upper-extremity project with written recommendations and intervention plan.

Name: Outcome Measure Selection Advisory
Description: Advisory on selecting validated outcome measures (goal measure, DASH, PROMIS) for a professional or research program.

Name: Return-to-Work Program Design
Description: Design of a structured work-conditioning and return-to-work protocol for work-related injury recovery.

Name: Graded Motor Imagery Training - Half Day
Description: Half-day staff training session on graded motor imagery and pain neuroscience for professional teams.

Name: Reader Education Module - chronic pain group
Description: Development of a multi-session chronic-pain self-management education module with handouts.

Name: Splinting & Orthosis Workshop
Description: Hands-on custom orthotic fabrication workshop for Occupational Therapy staff. Materials included.

Name: IRB Protocol Review Support
Description: Support preparing IRB submission materials and professional protocol documentation for a research pilot.

Name: Professional Guest Lecture
Description: Guest lecture for an academic Occupational Therapy program on upper-extremity rehabilitation or pain science.

Name: remote coaching Workflow Consultation
Description: Consultation on designing accessible, evidence-based remote coaching therapy workflows.

Name: Accessibility Audit - Professional App
Description: Structured accessibility and usability audit of a professional application against WCAG and professional standards.

Name: Annual Advisory Retainer - Prepaid
Description: Prepaid annual peer consultation retainer at a discounted rate versus monthly billing.

Name: Discovery Call - Initial Consultation
Description: Initial 30-minute discovery and scoping call for prospective advisory or consulting engagements.
